title: Gholdengo Shiny Fix (Cobblemon)
description: Changing Gholdengo's Shiny to what it should've been.
body:
# Shiny Gholdengo Fix

Shiny Gholdengo, now just as silver as it should be! This pack does nothing else and has no other requirements. Download and enjoy your new shiny Gholdengo.

![Two Shiny Gholdengo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lh5eMDsw/images/1eaeeff9fcfaa1e48514bada0e1f8dbef51931f8.png)
